reasoning: The bear case carries higher confidence (0.85 vs 0.78) with compounding bearish signals — deeply negative Fear & Greed (-0.44), negative funding rates (-0.3493), and a rising DXY — outweighing the bull case's reliance on available capital and a clean risk shield. MeanReversionV1 being active is insufficient justification for a long entry when the trend-following strategy is paused and macro headwinds persist.
key_risks: Negative funding rates (-0.3493) indicate market is positioned short, increasing probability of continued downside rather than mean reversion bounce
Rising DXY (+0.17%) provides macro headwind that historically suppresses crypto prices, undermining the bullish structural floor
